catalyst.event: Tencent Q2 2026 earnings release — first full quarter showing AI capex run-rate impact on operating margin AND Yuanbao/Hunyuan monetization KPIs (DAU, advertising CPM uplift from AI-targeted inventory)
catalyst.date_or_window: 2026-08-13 (±1 week, based on historical Q2 reporting cadence)
catalyst.source: Tencent IR historical reporting calendar; FY2025 capex guidance of low-teens % of revenue ramping into 2026

rightIf_conditions: Q2 2026 non-IFRS operating margin prints below 34.5% (vs. ~36% consensus implied)
FY2026 non-IFRS EPS consensus revised down ≥5% within 30 days post-Q2 print
Advertising revenue growth decelerates below 16% YoY in Q2 2026 (vs. ~18-20% consensus)
Stock trades to HK$580-620 range (-15% to -19% from current levels) within 4 months of Q2 print
wrongIf_conditions: Q2 2026 non-IFRS operating margin ≥36% — D&A absorbed by revenue mix improvement
Management quantifies AI revenue contribution ≥RMB 5bn annualized run-rate by Q2 2026
Two consecutive quarters (Q1 + Q2 2026) of advertising growth ≥22% YoY, validating AI ad monetization thesis
Stock breaks above HK$760 on Q2 print → close short, thesis invalidated
what_changes_our_mind: Q2 2026 earnings (mid-August 2026) shows non-IFRS operating margin ≥36% AND advertising revenue growth ≥20% YoY AND management quantifies Yuanbao/AI revenue contribution at ≥RMB 5bn annualized — this would prove AI monetization is offsetting D&A on schedule and consensus is right.
variant_view_one_sentence: Market believes AI capex is value-accretive in 2026 → We believe Q2 2026 will reveal D&A compression ahead of monetization → Mechanism is forced consensus EPS downgrade and multiple de-rating from 17x to 14-15x forward P/E.
time_to_resolution: 3-6 months (Q2 2026 print August + Q3 2026 print November)

expected_pnl_asymmetry.upside_if_right: +18% to +22% (short return as stock moves from HK$715 → HK$580-620)
expected_pnl_asymmetry.downside_if_wrong: -10% to -12% (cover at HK$785-800 if Q1 2026 print is too strong)

quantification.metric_target: Q2 2026 non-IFRS operating margin and resulting FY2026 EPS revision
quantification.current_value: Q4 2025 non-IFRS OPM 36.4%; FY2026 consensus non-IFRS EPS ~RMB 28.5
quantification.predicted_value: Q2 2026 non-IFRS OPM 33-34% (-200 to -300bps YoY); FY2026 EPS revised to RMB 26.5-27.0 (-5% to -7%)
quantification.predicted_horizon: By Q2 2026 earnings release (~2026-08-13), with full thesis resolution by Q3 2026 print (Nov 2026)
